sacco

Class TodoList

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.TodoList

  • public class TodoList
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TodoList()
      Constructs a new TodoList object with no items

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addItem(java.lang.String itemName)
      Adds a new item onto the end of the list
      void completeItemByNumber(int itemNumber)
      Marks the given item as completed
      int getItemCount()
      Returns the number of items that are in this TodoList
      int numberCompleted()
      Returns the number of completed items on the list
      void removeCompletedItems()
      Removes all of the items labeled as completed
      void removeItemByNumber(int itemNumber)
      Removes the item associated with the given number
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns a String that represents the list of items currently stored in the TodoList

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • TodoList

        public TodoList()
        Constructs a new TodoList object with no items

    • Method Detail

      • addItem

        public void addItem(java.lang.String itemName)
        Adds a new item onto the end of the list
        Parameters:
        itemName - The name of the item to add to the list.

      • removeItemByNumber

        public void removeItemByNumber(int itemNumber)
        Removes the item associated with the given number
        Parameters:
        itemNumber - The number of the item that is to removed

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a String that represents the list of items currently stored in the TodoList
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • getItemCount

        public int getItemCount()
        Returns the number of items that are in this TodoList
        Returns:
        The number of items in the list

      • completeItemByNumber

        public void completeItemByNumber(int itemNumber)
        Marks the given item as completed
        Parameters:
        itemNumber - The number of the item to be marked complete

      • numberCompleted

        public int numberCompleted()
        Returns the number of completed items on the list
        Returns:
        The number of completed items on the list

      • removeCompletedItems

        public void removeCompletedItems()
        Removes all of the items labeled as completed
